name: Omon.hfbasinpsmadv
title: Northward Ocean Heat Transport Due to Parameterized Submesoscale Advection
description: Contributions to heat transport from parameterized mesoscale eddy-induced advective transport. Diagnosed here as a function of latitude and basin.  Use Celsius for temperature scale.
processing note: For models which do not have a Cartesian lat-long grid, this transport can be approximated as the transport across zig-zag paths corresponding to latitudes with spacing between latitudes appropriate to the model's resolution, as is done for the ocean meridional overturning mass streamfunction. CHANGE SINCE CMIP6 in Cell Methods - CMIP6:longitude: sum (comment: basin sum [along zig-zag grid path]) depth: sum time: mean CMIP7:depth: longitude: sum where sea (along a zig-zag grid path spanning a basin) where sea time: mean,
